profile.name: M Husnain Shehnsha
profile.tagline: Machine Learning Engineer specializing in AI-driven solutions, RAG systems, and generative AI applications.
profile.specialization: AI & GenAI · Machine Learning · RAG Systems
profile.bio: Motivated Software Engineer specializing in the intersection of application development and Artificial Intelligence. Experienced in architecting robust, data-centric pipelines using Python and machine learning algorithms. Proven ability to integrate Large Language Models (LLMs), develop Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, and optimize vector databases. Dedicated to solving complex problems through efficient code and scalable AI solutions.

experience.summary: Developed and optimized AI pipelines with focus on RAG systems and LLM integration.
highlights: Developed and optimized RAG pipelines to improve the accuracy of LLM responses using external data sources
Executed advanced prompt engineering, iteratively refining system instructions to reduce hallucinations and ensure output consistency
Integrated vector databases and frameworks like LangChain and LlamaIndex to build responsive, context-aware AI applications

projects.title: ANIAD – Text To Animation
projects.subtitle: AI-powered 3D animation generation from text
projects.description: An end-to-end pipeline converting text descriptions directly into 3D animations utilizing generative AI models. Integrated TripoSR for accurate 2D-to-3D reconstruction and MiDaS for monocular depth estimation.

projects.title: Research Assistant ChatBot
projects.subtitle: RAG-powered intelligent document query system
projects.description: A specialized chatbot enabling users to query and extract precise information from curated research documents. Engineered semantic retrieval using vector databases with FastAPI backend and Gradio frontend.

projects.title: AI Tutor
projects.subtitle: Personalized learning system with RAG
projects.description: An end-to-end RAG system functioning as a personalized tutor, enabling users to interact with complex uploaded documents. Built robust text preprocessing pipeline with semantic vector embeddings.

projects.title: AI Recruiter — Voice-Based Multi-Agent System
projects.subtitle: Multi-agent voice AI for automated candidate screening & scheduling
projects.description: A multi-agent AI recruiter built with VAPI, featuring a squad of 4 specialized voice assistants (Greeting, Verification, Screening, Scheduling) that call candidates, verify identity, run a 15-rule eligibility engine, and book interviews autonomously. Call data, recordings, and transcriptions sync in real time to MongoDB via a FastAPI backend.

projects.title: TrialMatch — AI-Powered Clinical Trial Eligibility Engine
projects.subtitle: LLM-based patient-to-trial matching with evidence-cited eligibility decisions
projects.description: An AI-powered eligibility engine that matches patients to clinical trials in seconds instead of weeks. Cross-references a patient's medical summary against dense trial inclusion/exclusion criteria using Groq + Instructor for deterministic, structured LLM outputs, with Langfuse tracing for full reasoning transparency. Heavy AI evaluations are offloaded to Celery/Redis background workers so the FastAPI backend stays responsive. Data is stored in PostgreSQL with pgvector for future semantic search, and the system is rate-limited (SlowAPI) and load-tested (Locust) to sustain hundreds of concurrent users. A glassmorphic React + Tailwind frontend lets coordinators review the AI's step-by-step reasoning.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering
